BPEP Returns

1000X

Returns

Time

how to buy

Buy On Site
Send to Wallet
1

Connect Your Crypto Wallet

Go to the payment widget on the site and click on the “Connect Wallet” button. Follow the prompts to connect your wallet. Verify that you have sufficient funds to cover both the purchase amount and the network transaction fee (gas fee) for your selected currency (ETH, SOL, USDC, USDT, or BNB).
2

Select Token and Amount

Choose the currency you want to use and input the number of BPEP tokens you would like to purchase. Double-check your wallet balance to make sure it can cover the transaction.
3

Buy and Approve the Transaction

Confirm your purchase by approving the transaction prompt displayed in your connected wallet. Once approved, a record of your purchase and the number of tokens will be made on-chain!

Tokens

The number of tokens calculated based on the timestamp of your transaction and the price at that time. You will see your wallet balance when you connect the wallet you used to purchase your tokens to the Bitcoin Pepe website.

Claim

You will be able to claim your tokens at the end of the presale. A complete guide on claiming your tokens will be available on our website.

Weekly Giveaway 🚨

Days Left

Every week, we're giving away a massive 1,000,000 $BPEP tokens to our community! 🐸💥

It’s simple: Get involved, stay active, and you could be one of the lucky frogs hopping away with a huge stack of $BPEP. No gimmicks, just pure action. 💸🔥

Join the chaos, frens. The more you participate, the higher your chances! 🐸🚀

Meet The Team

  • Team
  • Moderators

Tafcir

Head of Partnerships

Tafcir is ex-Head of Marketing for multiple top 50 Market Cap crypto projects, with experience at Ubisoft’s Web3 division. Currently leading marketing and biz dev at Token Metrics, and serving as Lead SMM at Vaulta. KOL with 35K+ loyal followers. Pumped to be working with BitcoinPepe and fusing the hottest narratives in Web3: Memes, L2s, and Bitcoin to build something that truly hits home for the crypto community.

Allan

Chief Community Officer

With 3+ years in Web3 community management, Alan has built vibrant, inclusive spaces that people love to be part of. He is all about creating connection, good vibes, and real engagement. Allan is super hyped to join BitcoinPepe and bring some energy to grow the Bitcoin Pepe community and have a blast doing it!

LATEST AMA

Join the BPEPE team on daily AMAs and Spaces while they answer community Q&As, announce partnership and listings! All you have to do is follow our socials above.
